synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2415 Oracle Linux 8 libselinux bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2415
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2415

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-2415.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libselinux-2.9-11.el8_10.i686.rpm
libselinux-2.9-11.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
libselinux-devel-2.9-11.el8_10.i686.rpm
libselinux-devel-2.9-11.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
libselinux-ruby-2.9-11.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
libselinux-static-2.9-11.el8_10.i686.rpm
libselinux-static-2.9-11.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
libselinux-utils-2.9-11.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
python3-libselinux-2.9-11.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libselinux-2.9-11.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
libselinux-devel-2.9-11.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
libselinux-ruby-2.9-11.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
libselinux-static-2.9-11.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
libselinux-utils-2.9-11.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
python3-libselinux-2.9-11.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/libselinux-2.9-11.el8_10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2.9-11]
- Ignore files removed during relabeling (RHEL-123885)
